thread_title: Tips for beginner? (No prior gacha experience)

content: just go arachne daffodil and casiah n whoever. stack eternal in the realm and use telekinesis over and over again, that will carry you pretty far because arachneXcasiah is just that good. but obviously if you get that far you'll be able to boost it more and get more into building your lineup. oh and also casiah can use telekinesis on daffodil's exalt which can lead it to do even more damage
